title: waltheria ferruginea
intro: Waltheria ferruginea, also known as Waltheria or Waltheria ferruginea plant, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. Waltheria ferruginea has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Waltheria ferruginea is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and may be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
